    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AiGame
    Classe que gerencia o jogo de Batalha Naval contra uma IA baseada em LLM (Large Language Model).
    Barge
    The type Barge represents a ship with a size of 1 unit.
    BoardView
    Representa a visualização gráfica de um tabuleiro de Batalha Naval utilizando JavaFX.
    Caravel
    The type Caravel represents a ship with a size of 2 units.
    Carrack
    The type Carrack represents a ship with a size of 3 units.
    Compass
    The enum Compass.
    Fleet
    The type Fleet.
    Frigate
    The type Frigate represents a ship with a size of 4 units.
    Galleon
    The type Galleon represents a ship with a size of 5 units.
    Game
     
    GameGui
    Controlador principal da Interface Gráfica (GUI) para o jogo Batalha Naval.
    GameRecord
    Represents a single completed game record to be stored in the scoreboard.
    IFleet
    The interface Fleet.
    IGame
    The interface Game.
    IGame.ShotResult
     
    IMove
    IMove
    IPosition
    The interface Position.
    IShip
    The interface Ship.
    Main
    The type Main.
    Move
    Shot
    MoveTimer
    A classe MoveTimer mede o tempo decorrido em cada jogada (rajada) do jogo.
    PdfExporter
    PdfExporter is a utility class responsible for exporting Battleship game move history to a PDF document.
    Position
    Represents a position on the game board.
    ScoreboardManager
    Manages the game scoreboard by saving and loading GameRecord objects to/from a JSON file, and displaying the scoreboard in the console.
    Ship
    The type Ship.
    SystemPrompt
     
    Tasks
    The type Tasks.
